channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Debate grows over disclosure rules for paid political influencers in California gubernatorial race
item.description: The article examines the growing influence of social media creators in American politics and the increasing concern over undisclosed payments to influencers promoting political candidates. During the ...

item.title: Shack fire in Pretoria informal settlement claims one life and affects about 150 homes
item.description: A devastating shack fire at the Plastic View informal settlement in Moreleta Park, Pretoria, has left one person dead and caused widespread destruction to homes. Emergency services from the City of Ts...

item.title: 150 pastoralist women in Manyara granted customary land ownership certificates to boost land rights
item.description: A total of 150 women from pastoralist communities in Simanjiro and Kiteto districts in Tanzania’s Manyara Region have been issued with customary land ownership certificates in an initiative aimed at s...

item.title: Chadema Leaders Injured in Violent Attack in Songea Amid Rising Political Tensions
item.description: Reports from Songea in southern Tanzania indicate that leaders from the main opposition party, Chadema (Chama cha Demokrasia na Maendeleo), were attacked with machetes in a violent incident that has r...

item.title: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith says no future separation referendum will be held if voters reject separation in October
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith says she will not pursue another referendum on Alberta separation if voters reject the proposal in a planned October vote. During recent public remarks, Smith confirmed ...

item.title: Growing elite and public dissatisfaction in Russia amid war strain and economic pressure
item.description: The article examines increasing signs of discontent within parts of Russia’s political elite and wider society regarding President Vladimir Putin, as the war in Ukraine and domestic economic pressures...

item.title: Philippine Pickleball Federation prepares for tougher competition in World Cup 2026
item.description: The Philippine Pickleball Federation is preparing for what it expects to be a more competitive edition of the Pickleball World Cup in 2026, according to a report by ABS-CBN News. As the sport continue...

item.title: Analysis of Fubara’s Political Struggles and Trust Issues in Abuja APC Primaries
item.description: This opinion piece looks into the political tension surrounding Rivers State Governor Siminalayi Fubara and his alleged fallout with key power blocs in Abuja during the APC governorship primaries. The...

item.title: Iran relocates 2026 FIFA World Cup training base to Mexico over US visa concerns
item.description: Iran’s national football team has moved its training base for the 2026 FIFA World Cup from Tucson, Arizona, to Tijuana, Mexico, after FIFA approved a request linked to visa complications and ongoing g...

item.title: Democratic Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner declines to apologize for resurfaced post mocking wounded soldier
item.description: Democratic Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner is facing renewed scrutiny after a resurfaced Reddit post in which he mocked a wounded U.S. soldier. According to reporting from Fox News Digital, Plat...

item.title: Marco Rubio’s India Visit: US-India Relations Reaffirmed, Trade Deal Talks and Strategic Cooperation Advance
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio’s official visit to India on May 24, 2026, focused on strengthening bilateral ties between India and the United States amid ongoing global and economic challenges. ...

item.title: How Mali’s escalating insurgency offers security lessons for Nigeria
item.description: The article explains how the worsening security situation in Mali carries serious warnings for Nigeria, especially given both countries’ exposure to armed groups in the Sahel region. Mali, with a popu...

item.title: Jet2 flight diverted to Porto after pilot experiences medical emergency mid-flight
item.description: A Jet2 passenger flight travelling from Tenerife to Birmingham was forced to make an emergency diversion after one of the pilots suffered a suspected heart attack while the aircraft was cruising at ap...

item.title: Talkative guide disrupts romantic nature walk, prompting advice on handling future encounters
item.description: In this advice column installment of “Asking Eric,” a reader describes a social situation that unfolded during a group nature walk. The writer had joined the outing with a friend they hoped could beco...

item.title: Survivor Recounts Fatal Night Attack That Killed Former Matungu MP’s Son in Kisumu
item.description: A man who survived a deadly attack in Kisumu has narrated the events that led to the killing of Hannington Were, the son of former Matungu MP David Were. According to the report, the incident happened...

item.title: PM Shehbaz highlights agriculture, IT, SEZs and minerals for expanded Pakistan-China cooperation
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, during his official visit to China, identified agriculture, information technology, Special Economic Zones (SEZs), and mines and minerals as the core areas for strengthe...

item.title: Three people hospitalized following two-vehicle collision in Scarborough, Toronto
item.description: Three individuals were taken to hospital following a two-vehicle collision in the Scarborough area of Toronto, according to the reported news article. The incident involved two vehicles that collided ...

item.title: Sam Campbell’s rise as an unconventional comedy star and his surreal new sitcom Make That Movie
item.description: Australian comedian Sam Campbell has cemented his reputation as one of the most unconventional voices in contemporary comedy, with a career that has rapidly expanded since relocating to the UK in the ...

item.title: Malaysian national's body recovered after building collapse in Pampanga
item.description: A Malaysian national was recovered after a building collapse incident in Pampanga, Philippines, according to a report published by ABS-CBN News on May 24, 2026 at 06:09 PM PHT. Authorities retrieved t...

item.title: A Collection of Rita Hayworth Portraits from the 1942 Film “My Gal Sal”
item.description: This article presents a curated collection of portraits of Rita Hayworth taken during the production of the 1942 musical film “My Gal Sal.” The movie is a Technicolor Hollywood production that pays tr...
